personal.tagline: Building scalable, accessible, and visually stunning digital experiences.
personal.about: I am a software developer specialized in creating efficient mobile applications, web systems, and digital solutions. I work with technologies like React Native, Flutter, and Firebase, focusing on building functional, fast, and scalable products.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Getting to know the developer
about.p1: I have developed projects such as expense tracking applications, business management systems, and digital platforms aimed at improving productivity and organization.
about.p2: My approach goes beyond code: I analyze real-world problems to design technological solutions that provide value and concrete results.

services.title: My services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you
services.s1_desc: Building SPA and SSR web applications using React, Next.js, and modern architectures.
services.s2_desc: Creating clean interfaces and coherent design systems using tools like Tailwind CSS.
services.s3_desc: Performance audits, lazy loading, and improving Core Web Vitals metrics.
services.s4_desc: Cross-platform applications with React Native offering fluid native experiences.
services.s5_desc: Designing maintainable and efficient codebases prepared to grow with your business.
services.s6_desc: Technical advice and positioning strategies for modern applications.

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: My development process
process.p1_desc: We understand your goals, audience, and technical requirements in depth.
process.p2_desc: We create wireframes and a clear visual proposal before writing any code.
process.p3_desc: Implementation in sprints with iterative deliveries and continuous feedback.
process.p4_desc: Deployment to production, monitoring, and long-term maintenance.

benefits.title: Why choose me
benefits.subtitle: Added value
benefits.b1_desc: Clean architecture and modular components ready to grow.
benefits.b2_desc: Fluid experiences on any device, mobile or desktop.
benefits.b3_desc: Core Web Vitals audits and fast loading times.
benefits.b4_desc: Best practices, static typing, and proper data handling.

faq.title: Help Center
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How long does a project usually take?
faq.a1: A landing page can take 2 to 3 weeks. More complex web applications usually require between 1 and 3 months, depending on the scope.
faq.q2: Do you work with other technologies besides React?
faq.a2: Yes, although my specialty is the React ecosystem (Next.js, Vite, React Native), I also have experience with Vue and Node.js for the backend.
faq.q3: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
faq.a3: Of course! My higher-tier plans include support, and I also offer custom monthly maintenance plans.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your project
contact.idea: Do you have an idea in mind?
contact.desc: I'm available for freelance projects, consulting, or joining a great team. Write to me and I will reply in less than 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell me more about your idea...
contact.thanks: Thanks! I have received your message. I will contact you very soon.

testimonials.title: What my clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real testimonials
testimonials.empty_desc: Be the first to tell your experience working with me.
testimonials.leave_desc: Your opinion is super valuable to me. Tell me briefly how your experience was working together.

footer.desc: Designing and developing exceptional web applications that drive business growth.
footer.built: Built with React, Vite and Tailwind CSS.
